failure_summary: The baseline-only real run produced a valid PASS outcome. The treatment-only real run started SDK-Orchestrated Mode, completed planner evidence, started the dev worker thread, and then exceeded timeout_ms=180000 before DevResult, evaluator, validation, or FinalDeliveryReport evidence could be completed.

regrade.gate_failure_category_note: Gate output currently maps the partial test-coverage treatment failure to FEATURE_TREATMENT_PLANNER_TIMEOUT even though planner evidence completed and the checkpoint state shows the dev_worker stage timed out.

required_fix: Review the generic test-coverage treatment dev worker timeout and the release-gate failure-category mapping. After a code or prompt fix is approved and dry validation passes, run exactly one test-coverage-002 treatment-only fresh rerun; do not rerun baseline unless explicitly approved.
